---
title: "About"
toc-location: left
---

## Background

Hi, I'm Alina Bolshakova. I am a finance professional with 11 years of experience in financial planning, budgeting and modelling. Currently a Team Lead and Finance Business Partner, creating strategic plans and managing a team, also  building financial models with complex SQL queries, and translating numbers into actionable business strategies.

## Data Analysis

I always was inspired by the power of data. And started learning Python and SQL 4 years ago. At my current position I combine financial expertise with data analysis. But I wanted to explore data science more deeply with machine learning and neural networks, which led me to pursuing MSc in Business Analytics in Dublin City University. I see this as my chance to connect traditional finance with data-driven approaches.

## Skills

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
{{< fa chart-line >}} Financial Planning & Analysis

{{< fa database >}} SQL

{{< fa code >}} Python
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
{{< fa chart-bar >}} Data Visualisation

{{< fa users >}} Team Leadership

{{< fa file-excel >}} Advanced Excel & Financial Modelling
:::
::::

## Education

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal"}
**MSc in Business Analytics** — *Dublin City University*

**Bachelor's and Master's in Economics and Management** — *Voronezh State University*
:::

## Beyond Work

If I'm not deeply consumed by my finance work, you'll find me exploring Dublin, reading about behavioural economics, or experimenting with data visualisation techniques.

---

*Feel free to connect with me on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/alina-bolshakova/){target=_blank} or check out my work on [GitHub](https://github.com/AyaBlck){target=_blank}.*
